description: Ordered verification gates. Run in order; stop at first failure. Code gates went 'active' with the F-001 scaffold. 'e2e' went 'active' with F-011 (the REST API — first user-facing surface). Web gates ('a11y', 'web-perf') are 'planned' and activate with F-028 (the dashboard); see ADR-0021.

gates.description: TypeScript strict typecheck across the workspace (turbo run typecheck).
ESLint (flat config) incl. package-boundary rule (turbo run lint).
Prettier formatting check (code + root config; docs/harness excluded).
Unit + integration tests via Vitest (turbo run test), incl. adapter conformance suites.
Turborepo build of all packages and apps.

End-to-end tests across surfaces. api/mcp run HTTP-/SDK-surface e2e (app.inject / in-memory transport; active since F-011). Web (since F-028) runs Playwright against its own dev server, including @axe-core WCAG A/AA assertions. CI installs the Playwright browser before this gate.

Accessibility (axe / WCAG 2.1 AA) for apps/web — active since F-028 (ADR-0021). Asserted inside the web Playwright e2e (gate 6); CI's e2e step covers it, so no separate CI step is needed. Listed here for traceability.

Frontend performance budget (bundle size / Lighthouse) for apps/web. Planned (ADR-0021); activates with F-028. Enforces code-split of heavy views and a lean initial bundle. Exact command finalized at F-028.
